evidence: EmitWat supports Unit entrypoint returns by omitting value_return and rejects Unit ABI parameters in loadParams.
EmitWat lowers Bool literals, locals, returns, event fields, storage scalars, and map values using i32/i32.load8_u helpers.
EmitWat lowers U32 literals, params, locals, returns, arithmetic, casts, storage scalars, and map values.
EmitWat lowers U64 literals, params, locals, returns, arithmetic, storage scalars, map keys, map values, and array indices.
EmitWat lowers Hash literals as four limbs, hash helpers, hash params/returns, hash scalars, and hash map keys/values.
EmitWat lowers fixed array literals, indexing, equality, local storage in linear memory, and release deallocation.
EmitWat lowers struct literals, field access, scalar struct storage field read/write, equality through field values, and release deallocation.

EmitWat lowers Address as u64 (same as WasmNear IR v0); address literals, params, locals, returns, storage scalars, and map values use the u64 lowering path; pattern match exhaustiveness verified across EmitWat/WasmNear backend.
EmitWat does not support Bytes; WasmNear IR v0 rejects data.dynamic_bytes before lowering, and EmitWat valueTypeName returns error "wasm-near IR v0 does not support Bytes".
EmitWat does not support String; WasmNear IR v0 rejects data.dynamic_bytes before lowering, and EmitWat valueTypeName returns error "wasm-near IR v0 does not support String".
EmitWat stateLayout maps scalar state ids to storage keys and lowers scalar read/write helpers for U32/U64/Bool/Hash and struct-valued scalar state.
EmitWat mapLayout maps map state to storage prefixes and lowers contains/get/set/insert for U64 and Hash keys with scalar or hash values.
EmitWat mapLayout represents array state as U64-keyed storage prefixes and lowers storageArrayRead/storageArrayWrite.
EmitWat emits i32.const for U32 literals.
EmitWat emits i64.const for U64 literals.
EmitWat emits i32.const 1/0 for Bool literals.
EmitWat emits four U64 limbs and calls the hash constructor helper.
EmitWat emits i64.const for Address literals (same as U64); address is treated as a u64 scalar in the wasm-near backend.
EmitWat lowers userId to predecessor_account_id hashing through the context helper.
EmitWat lowers contractId to current_account_id hashing through the context helper.
EmitWat lowers checkpointId to block_index.
EmitWat does not lower timestamp context reads; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId have explicit direct-WAT host mappings.
EmitWat does not lower chainId context reads; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId have explicit direct-WAT host mappings.
EmitWat does not lower gasPrice context reads; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId have explicit direct-WAT host mappings.
EmitWat does not lower gasLeft context reads; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId have explicit direct-WAT host mappings.
EmitWat does not lower baseFee context reads; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId have explicit direct-WAT host mappings.
EmitWat does not lower prevRandao context reads; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId have explicit direct-WAT host mappings.
EmitWat does not lower origin context reads; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId have explicit direct-WAT host mappings.
EmitWat does not lower coinbase context reads; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId have explicit direct-WAT host mappings.
EmitWat does not lower blockHash context reads; only userId, contractId, and checkpointId have explicit direct-WAT host mappings.
EmitWat lowers local and scalar-storage compound add with the numeric wasm add operator.
EmitWat lowers local and scalar-storage compound subtract with the numeric wasm sub operator.
EmitWat lowers local and scalar-storage compound multiply with the numeric wasm mul operator.
EmitWat lowers local and scalar-storage compound division with the unsigned wasm div operator.
EmitWat lowers local and scalar-storage compound modulo with the unsigned wasm rem operator.
EmitWat lowers local and scalar-storage bitwise and.
EmitWat lowers local and scalar-storage bitwise or.
EmitWat lowers local and scalar-storage bitwise xor.
EmitWat lowers local and scalar-storage shift left.
EmitWat lowers local and scalar-storage unsigned shift right.
EmitWat lowerExpr handles all Literal constructors directly.
EmitWat lowers locals to local.get after local collection and parameter decoding.
EmitWat lowers array literals to generated __pf_arr_lit helpers backed by the configured allocator.
EmitWat lowers fixed array indexing with scalar-width pointer arithmetic and typed loads.
EmitWat lowers struct literals to generated __pf_struct_lit helpers.
EmitWat lowers struct field access with field offsets and typed loads.
EmitWat lowers numeric add for matching U32/U64 operands.
EmitWat lowers numeric subtract for matching U32/U64 operands.
EmitWat lowers numeric multiply for matching U32/U64 operands.
EmitWat lowers unsigned numeric division for matching U32/U64 operands.
EmitWat lowers unsigned numeric remainder for matching U32/U64 operands.
EmitWat lowers pow through generated U32/U64 exponentiation helpers.
EmitWat lowers bitwise and for matching U32/U64 operands.
EmitWat lowers bitwise or for matching U32/U64 operands.
EmitWat lowers bitwise xor for matching U32/U64 operands.
EmitWat lowers shift left for matching U32/U64 operands.
EmitWat lowers unsigned shift right for matching U32/U64 operands.
EmitWat lowers U32/U64/Bool casts that preserve the supported wasm scalar surface and rejects unsupported casts.
EmitWat lowers scalar/hash/fixed-array equality with wasm comparisons or helper calls.
EmitWat lowers scalar/hash/fixed-array inequality with wasm comparisons or helper calls.
EmitWat lowers scalar less-than comparisons for matching operands.
EmitWat lowers scalar less-or-equal comparisons for matching operands.
EmitWat lowers scalar greater-than comparisons for matching operands.
EmitWat lowers scalar greater-or-equal comparisons for matching operands.
EmitWat lowers boolean and with i32.and after Bool validation.
EmitWat lowers boolean or with i32.or after Bool validation.
EmitWat lowers boolean not with i32.eqz.
EmitWat lowers four U64 limbs into a hash value helper.
EmitWat lowers hash preimage hashing through the sha256-backed helper.
EmitWat lowers two-to-one hash through the hash concat helper.
EmitWat does not lower native attached value inspection; lowerExpr falls through to the unsupported expression diagnostic.
EmitWat capability checking rejects crosscall.invoke before lowering.
EmitWat capability checking rejects typed cross-contract calls before lowering.
EmitWat capability checking rejects value-bearing typed cross-contract calls before lowering.
EmitWat capability checking rejects static typed cross-contract calls before lowering.
EmitWat capability checking rejects delegate typed cross-contract calls before lowering.
EmitWat capability checking rejects contract creation through the crosscall capability.
EmitWat capability checking rejects create2 contract creation through the crosscall capability.
EmitWat lowerExpr delegates expression-position effects to storage/context/map/array/struct effect lowering.
EmitWat lowers scalar reads through typed storage_read helpers.
EmitWat lowers scalar writes through typed storage_write helpers, including struct-valued scalar writes.
EmitWat lowers scalar assignOp for non-hash scalar state by reading, applying the numeric/bitwise op, and writing back.
EmitWat lowers map contains through storage_has_key with U64 or Hash keys.
EmitWat lowers map get through typed map read helpers with default-on-missing behavior.
EmitWat lowers map insert through the same map write helper surface as set, returning the previous value.
EmitWat lowers map set through map write helpers, returning the previous value when used as an expression.
EmitWat lowers array state reads as U64-keyed map reads.
EmitWat lowers array state writes as U64-keyed map writes.
EmitWat lowers field reads inside struct-valued storage arrays by reading the U64-indexed storage blob into STRUCT_BUF and loading the field offset.
EmitWat lowers field writes inside struct-valued storage arrays by reading the U64-indexed storage blob, patching the field offset, and writing the blob back.
EmitWat lowers scalar struct storage field reads by reading the struct blob and loading the field offset.
EmitWat lowers scalar struct storage field writes by reading the struct blob, patching a field, and writing the blob back.
EmitWat lowers single mapKey storage paths to map get; multi-segment field/index paths are rejected.
EmitWat lowers single mapKey storage paths to map write; multi-segment field/index paths are rejected.
EmitWat lowers storagePathAssignOp for single mapKey paths with U32/U64 map values; field/index and effectful key paths remain rejected.
EmitWat lowers userId, contractId, and checkpointId context reads through NEAR host helpers.
EmitWat lowers non-indexed events to JSON assembled in guest memory and emitted with log_utf8.
EmitWat does not yet lower indexed events.
EmitWat only supports single mapKey storage paths; field path segments are not lowered yet.
EmitWat only supports single mapKey storage paths; index path segments are not lowered yet.
EmitWat lowers single mapKey path segments through map helpers.
EmitWat lowers immutable let bindings to local.set after expression lowering.
EmitWat lowers mutable let bindings to local.set after expression lowering.
EmitWat lowers assignment to local.set for local targets.
EmitWat lowers local compound assignment for numeric locals.
EmitWat lowers statement-position storage, map, array, struct, event, and assertion-compatible effects.
EmitWat lowers assert by trapping with unreachable when the Bool condition is false.
EmitWat lowers assertEq with scalar/hash/fixed-array equality checks followed by a trap on mismatch.
EmitWat lowers release of owned fixed-array and struct locals to __pf_arr_dealloc after IR ownership checking.
EmitWat lowers if/else to wasm if with lowered branch bodies.
EmitWat lowers boundedFor to wasm block/loop/br_if control flow.
EmitWat lowers returns to value_return helpers for U32/U64/Bool/Hash values.
